subject: Revert "[SDNC] Fix issue with certs from CMPv2 by Netconf (TLS)"
commit_message:
Revert "[SDNC] Fix issue with certs from CMPv2 by Netconf (TLS)"

This reverts commit af82e2bec90f84bdfcda11ff7c240985b6ab8201.

This is a possible candidate for breaking the E2E tests.

Issue-ID: SDNC-1477
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>
Change-Id: Icf6f5c52dab2234c04bc3d88d2eef9a05deb8d4d

Be careful...the link is dangerously misleading...

in both cases basic_vm and basic_cnf were executed but we do not have the logs..
we can see that in the 
> 5Gbulkpm :: 5G Bulk PM Usecase functionality                          | PASS |
> --------> basic_vm tests NOT executed

NOT executed means that we were not able to collect the logs

on AKS4: https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap/-/pipelines/268496164
on Orange 3: https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap/-/pipelines/268591591

as we pushed to the backend with the gerrit-id/patch-id, in case of redeploy we may collect old logs for the dashboard, we do not have the id of redeploy attempts.

but here for basic_cnf and basic_vm, on the 2 last attempts, we do not have the results of the run - logs show that results are earlier results -

when we look at the logs, we can see that the dockers started but reached the test timeout (45m)(e.g. basic_vm => https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap/-/jobs/1088387021
unfortunately we do not have the logs as we rsync at the end of the test

I had a look at the master of the day because it seems that we have the same behavior...but we can access to the logs

in the master, as here, the basic_vm docker seems to be stuck
the test starts at 2021-03-11 06:41:55
the model is properly distributed by SDC at 06:48:10
the test is running but seems to be stuck in SO at service instantiation

still trying at 07:42:00
....
still trying at 08:00:00

so in case of gating or daily results, the test timeout (45) would have expired and results reported as FAIL

in so logs 
it seems we are stuck at 36%
2021-03-11T07:46:53.674Z|593ed7cc-0738-440a-aa6d-ec4d09905a8a|http-nio-8080-exec-7|onap/so/infra/orchestrationRequests/v7/a2af4d94-73cd-430d-b615-bf559e4a8d21|InfraPortalClient|Unknown-Target-Entity|http://so-request-db-adapter.onap:8083/infraActiveRequests/a2af4d94-73cd-430d-b615-bf559e4a8d21|DEBUG|500||Response body: {
  "requestId" : "a2af4d94-73cd-430d-b615-bf559e4a8d21",
  "requestStatus" : "IN_PROGRESS",
  "flowStatus" : "Execution of AssignVfModuleBB has completed successfully, next invoking CreateVfModuleBB (Execution Path progress: BBs completed = 1; BBs remaining = 2).",
  "progress" : 36,

If I look into SDNC logs (tests done at the end of the tests so I assume basic_vm and basic_cnf are were stuck when this test has been performed)
https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//119053-1/infrastructure-healthcheck/k8s-teardown/kubernetes-status/pod-onap-sdnc-0-sdnc.log

we keep on having an exception

2021-03-11T00:12:44,243 | WARN  | qtp25668424-2648 | AbstractAuthenticator            | 147 - org.apache.shiro.core - 1.3.2 |  -   | Authentication failed for token submission [org.apache.shiro.authc.UsernamePasswordToken - admin, rememberMe=false].  Possible unexpected error? (Typical or expected login exceptions should extend from AuthenticationException).
org.opendaylight.aaa.api.AuthenticationException: UserName / Password not found
	at org.opendaylight.aaa.shiro.idm.IdmLightProxy.dbAuthenticate(IdmLightProxy.java:106) ~[?:?]
	at java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap.computeIfAbsent(Unknown Source) ~[?:?]
	at org.opendaylight.aaa.shiro.idm.IdmLightProxy.authenticate(IdmLightProxy.java:67) ~[?:?]
	at org.opendaylight.aaa.shiro.idm.IdmLightProxy.authenticate(IdmLightProxy.java:40) ~[?:?]
	at org.opendaylight.aaa.shiro.tokenauthrealm.auth.HttpBasicAuth.generateAuthentication(HttpBasicAuth.java:102) ~[?:?]
	at org.opendaylight.aaa.shiro.tokenauthrealm.auth.HttpBasicAuth.validate(HttpBasicAuth.java:122) ~[?:?]


it is a bit strange than the SO never reaches a timeout
I have no idea if SO is stuck because of the exception seen in SDNC...
I think Seshu shall have access to the Orange Daily, he can have a look
